name: Prophetess Mary Bushiri
bio: Mary Bushiri is the Board Chair of the Miss Malawi Organization, a Malawian chartered accountant, entrepreneur, and philanthropist known for her leadership and commitment to community development. She works alongside Prophet Shepherd Bushiri and leads initiatives that support vulnerable communities, while championing women’s empowerment and driving the pageant’s vision for purpose, leadership, and national impact.

name: Bernadette Mweso
bio: Oversees the entire Miss Malawi organization, sets strategic direction, ensures all departments align with the pageant’s vision, and represents the brand at national and international platforms.

name: Godfrey Kambewa
bio: Manages day-to-day operations, coordinates between departments, ensures smooth execution of pageant activities, and implements organizational policies.

name: James Mathews Banda
bio: Oversees budgeting, financial planning, and expenditure tracking; ensures transparency and accountability in all financial transactions.

name: Monalisa Mkumba
bio: Ensures contestants follow proper etiquette, manages protocol during events, and provides guidance and supervision to contestants throughout the pageant

name: Zikani Chiumia
bio: Plans, coordinates, and executes all events and productions, including rehearsals, photoshoots, and the grand finale, ensuring a seamless show experience.

name: Calista Kachulu
bio: Serves as the main point of contact for contestants, manages schedules, supports their needs, and ensures their well-being during training and events.

name: Stephan Mdala
bio: Handles media relations, manages press coverage, crafts official communications, and promotes the pageant across traditional and digital media channels.

name: Gilbert Kamaliza
bio: Oversees the entire Miss Malawi organization, sets strategic direction, ensures all departments align with the pageant’s vision, and represents the brand at national and international platforms.

name: Macpherson Gondwe
bio: Develops marketing campaigns, manages social media and digital outreach, and ensures maximum visibility and engagement for Miss Malawi 2026
